headline.vsl_adaptation: A heart surgeon is calling this beet lozenge a circulation miracle. The discovery of Nitric Oxide won the Nobel Prize - and now you can test your own NO levels for free and potentially boost your blood flow in as little as 20 minutes...

lead.opening_verbatim: Are you concerned with blood pressure or cholesterol, a lack of stamina and energy, an increase in 'senior moments', or a dip in libido and physical performance? If so, it may be time to check your NO levels with a simple saliva test.

mechanism.mechanism_name: Nitric Oxide Restoration via Beet Extract
mechanism.mechanism_description: Nobel Prize-winning discovery - Nitric Oxide is natural gas that dilates arteries for blood flow. Body produces 50% less NO after age 40. Beet extract lozenge creates NO instantly via saliva contact (fast-dissolve technology), then continues producing NO for hours. Tells arteries to relax, increasing oxygen delivery.

proof_elements.verbatim: Three researchers received the prestigious Nobel Prize for this discovery
The American Heart Association published one of many studies
Actual Thermographic image shows circulation before and after taking CircO2

key_sections.content_verbatim: NO, or what is known as Nitric Oxide in the scientific community, is a natural gas produced by the body that has amazing effects on blood circulation. Three researchers received the prestigious Nobel Prize for this discovery. Louis J. Ignarro, one of the winners says, 'There may be no disease process where this miracle molecule does not have a protective role'.

The American Heart Association published one of many studies showing that Americans, especially over 40, don't produce enough Nitric Oxide (NO). In fact, your body produces less than half of what you did when you were 20. This is why many see such a dramatic change in their health starting around age 40.

Red beet extract is the superstar ingredient that makes the other NO boosting nutrients work better than other formulas. This patent-pending system works in two ways. First, the patented 'fast-dissolve' lozenge creates Nitric Oxide instantly as it comes into contact with your saliva. Within minutes, the newly created NO tells arteries to relax. Second, as the lozenge is further metabolized over several hours, it helps your body to produce even more NO.

thermographic_proof.description: Before/after thermographic images showing fingertip circulation
thermographic_proof.before: Dark = Low Blood Flow - fingertips almost black
thermographic_proof.after: Light = Increased Blood Flow - lighter colored fingers after 20 minutes

testimonials.quote: I feel so much better since I started taking it. My energy level has increased as well as my mental sharpness.
I was surprised to be able to play 18 holes of golf in the hot sun and not be tired.

sexual_benefits.women: The same applies to women, as without proper blood flow to the clitoris, they cannot have orgasms.
